name: Seed initial L2/L3 artifacts
description: Populate each new block with seed data representing the current state of the consumer migration arc — three open decisions, one spec-review target, one feature with story decomposition, six framework gaps, one layer plan.
exit_criteria: decisions.json contains DEC-0001 through DEC-0003 in proposed state
spec-reviews.json contains REVIEW-001 in not-started state
features.json contains FEAT-001 (consumer migration epic) in proposed state
framework-gaps.json contains FGAP-001 through FGAP-006 in identified state
layer-plans.json contains PLAN-001 in draft state
every data file validates against its schema via AJV
